Mehrdad Ema

Web, Graphic, & Digital Designer

About Me My Work

About Me

I am a web and graphic designer with a strong and diverse set of skills in digital design, print, and front-end development which keep me motivated to approach the mediums with creativity and meaningful connection in mind. I strive to get better at what I do every day and I am inspired by the ever growing world of technology and innovation.

I have an academic background in Graphic Design and Interactive Multimedia, and I have years of experience in the deseign industry.
